## Meeting Purpose

[Handover from Vivek to Carrie and review January performance.](https://fathom.video/share/CnWNTYtrvetPyMEGWFXefC5vRYmq22zZ?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Leadership Transition:** Vivek (GrowthX) is handing off client management to Carrie (GrowthX) effective Jan 31.](https://fathom.video/share/CnWNTYtrvetPyMEGWFXefC5vRYmq22zZ?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [**Strong January Performance:** Traffic is strong, already at \~75% of December's total. LLM referral traffic is also robust, and the sentiment gap to competitor CT Corp has narrowed.](https://fathom.video/share/CnWNTYtrvetPyMEGWFXefC5vRYmq22zZ?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**New AI Tool ("CheckThat"):** GrowthX is launching a new tool to replace Scrunch. It focuses on "evaluation stage" LLM prompts and provides 90 days of historical data upon activation.](https://fathom.video/share/CnWNTYtrvetPyMEGWFXefC5vRYmq22zZ?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [**Content Blocked:** Two calibration articles are awaiting Mike's review before production can proceed.](https://fathom.video/share/CnWNTYtrvetPyMEGWFXefC5vRYmq22zZ?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)

## Topics

### January Performance & Content Updates

  - [**Traffic:** January traffic is strong, already at \~75% of December's total.](https://fathom.video/share/CnWNTYtrvetPyMEGWFXefC5vRYmq22zZ?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Pillar Performance:** Weekly volatility exists, but the overall trend is positive.](https://fathom.video/share/CnWNTYtrvetPyMEGWFXefC5vRYmq22zZ?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
      - [Registered Agent Service pillar → +10% traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/CnWNTYtrvetPyMEGWFXefC5vRYmq22zZ?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [**LLM Referral Traffic:** Following the strong overall traffic trend.](https://fathom.video/share/CnWNTYtrvetPyMEGWFXefC5vRYmq22zZ?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [**Scrunch Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/CnWNTYtrvetPyMEGWFXefC5vRYmq22zZ?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [Prompt volume → Significant boost.](https://fathom.video/share/CnWNTYtrvetPyMEGWFXefC5vRYmq22zZ?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [Sentiment → Positive.](https://fathom.video/share/CnWNTYtrvetPyMEGWFXefC5vRYmq22zZ?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [Gap to CT Corp (2nd position) → Significantly narrowed.](https://fathom.video/share/CnWNTYtrvetPyMEGWFXefC5vRYmq22zZ?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**Content Production:**](https://fathom.video/share/CnWNTYtrvetPyMEGWFXefC5vRYmq22zZ?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
      - [On track, pending Mike's review of two calibration articles.](https://fathom.video/share/CnWNTYtrvetPyMEGWFXefC5vRYmq22zZ?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
      - ["Private entity fund formation" articles are now Delaware-specific for maximum applicability.](https://fathom.video/share/CnWNTYtrvetPyMEGWFXefC5vRYmq22zZ?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)

### New Tool: "CheckThat"

  - [**Purpose:** GrowthX's proprietary AI visibility tool, replacing Scrunch for reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/CnWNTYtrvetPyMEGWFXefC5vRYmq22zZ?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [**Focus:** "Evaluation stage" LLM prompts (e.g., "compare X vs. Y"), which drive user decision-making.](https://fathom.video/share/CnWNTYtrvetPyMEGWFXefC5vRYmq22zZ?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)
  - [**Key Advantages:**](https://fathom.video/share/CnWNTYtrvetPyMEGWFXefC5vRYmq22zZ?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
      - [**Historical Data:** Provides 90 days of data immediately upon activation, eliminating the initial waiting period required by Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/CnWNTYtrvetPyMEGWFXefC5vRYmq22zZ?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
      - [**Data Depth:** More focused data collection is expected to yield more valuable insights.](https://fathom.video/share/CnWNTYtrvetPyMEGWFXefC5vRYmq22zZ?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)
      - [**Client Access:** Planned for early February.](https://fathom.video/share/CnWNTYtrvetPyMEGWFXefC5vRYmq22zZ?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Mike:** Review the two calibration articles in Slack by Jan 23.](https://fathom.video/share/CnWNTYtrvetPyMEGWFXefC5vRYmq22zZ?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
  - [**Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/CnWNTYtrvetPyMEGWFXefC5vRYmq22zZ?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Schedule a full "CheckThat" demo for next week's sync.](https://fathom.video/share/CnWNTYtrvetPyMEGWFXefC5vRYmq22zZ?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Verify all prompts and competitors are correctly loaded into "CheckThat."](https://fathom.video/share/CnWNTYtrvetPyMEGWFXefC5vRYmq22zZ?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
